case_title: BAQM CLEANING SERVICE VS. RY AND HAMMER

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF BAOM CLEANING SERVICE RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAQM CLEANING SERVICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF BAQM CLEANING SERVICE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RY AND HAMMER IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS REVEIWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
